source: agenda-state.md (Work Personal Assistant) - single source of truth

stageLegend.label: Prelim
stageLegend.desc: Feasibility, design, research, prototyping. Nothing permanent built yet.

stageLegend.label: Dev
stageLegend.desc: Net-new code through release. Includes pre-release QA and RC work.

stageLegend.label: Post-Release
stageLegend.desc: Work on shipped features: bug fixes, patches, migrations, config, maintenance.

stageLegend.label: Meetings
stageLegend.desc: Weekly status / team connects and project scoping calls.
